name: Crockpot Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (1 1/2 lbs) beans (pea, navy, or great northern)
1/2 cup brown sugar (dark or light works fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the beans.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Boil 2 minutes and remove from heat.
3. Let soak for 1 hour.
4. Bring to a boil again and simmer approximately 45 minutes or until cooked but not soft or mushy.
5. Drain the beans.
6. Put them in the crockpot.
7. Mix the remaining ingredients together and stir into the beans.
8. Turn on low and cook for 10-12 hours. This dish is great to prepare the night before, so you can turn it on when leaving for work in the morning. Dinner will be ready when you return home at night, and the house will smell wonderful!
